scantool.ptxt: As the data values given in the following table are standard values estimated on the basis of values obtained from the normally operating vehicles using a scan tool, use them as reference values. Even when the vehicle is in good condition, there may be cases where the checked value does not fall within each specified data range. Therefore, judgment as abnormal should not be made depending on these data alone.

Also, condition in the following table that can be checked by the scan tool are those detected by TCM and output from TCM as commands and there may be cases where the CVT or actuator is not operating (in the condition) as indicated by the scan tool.

attention3.ptxt: The following scan tool data related to CVT can be checked only by communicating with TCM.

item.ptxt: Select lever: R or M range

entry.ptxt: The same value as engine speed reading

item.ptxt: Vehicle: Running with engine speed at approx. 2,000 rpm
Select lever: R or M range

entry.ptxt: The same value as speedometer reading

item.ptxt: Engine: Specified idle speed after warming up
Engine: Specified idle speed after warming up
Select lever: D or R range
Engine: Specified idle speed after warming up
Select lever: D or R range
Engine: Specified idle speed after warming up
Select lever: D or R range
Engine: Specified idle speed after warming up
Select lever: D or R range
Engine: Specified idle speed after warming up

entry.ptxt: Select lever: D or M range in 1st gear position
Select lever: R range or D or M range in 2nd gear position

item.ptxt: Engine: Specified idle speed after warming up
Select lever: D or R range
Engine: Specified idle speed after warming up
Select lever: D or R range

entry.ptxt: Select lever: D or M range in 1st gear position
Select lever: R range or D or M range in 2nd gear position

item.ptxt: Engine: Specified idle speed after warming up

entry.ptxt: Engine: Specified idle speed after warming up
Planetary gear unit: When shifting from 1st to 2nd or from 2nd to 1st
Select lever: D or M range in 1st gear position
Select lever: D or M range in 2nd gear position
Select lever: other than M range
The same position as select lever
Within 2 sec. after set ignition ON

topic.title: Turbine Speed (rpm)
topic.ptxt: This parameter indicates turbine speed calculated by multiplying a primary pulley speed and reduction gear ratio.

topic.title: Primary Pulley Speed (rpm)
topic.ptxt: This parameter indicates primary pulley speed detected by primary pulley speed sensor.

topic.title: Secondary Pulley Speed (rpm)
topic.ptxt: This parameter indicates secondary pulley speed detected by secondary pulley speed sensor.

topic.title: Vehicle Speed (km/h / mph)
topic.ptxt: This parameter indicates vehicle speed detected by vehicle speed sensor.

topic.title: Battery Voltage (V)
topic.ptxt: This parameter indicates battery positive voltage inputted through CVT relay to TCM.

topic.title: CVTF Temperature (°C, °F)
topic.ptxt: This parameter indicates CVT fluid temperature detected by CVT fluid temperature sensor.

topic.title: Line Pressure (MPa)
topic.ptxt: This parameter indicates line pressure detected by secondary pressure sensor.

topic.title: Slope Sensor (%)
topic.ptxt: This parameter indicates vehicle slope angle detected by slope sensor.

topic.title: Line Press Sol (Com) (Line Pressure Control Solenoid Command, mA)
topic.ptxt: This parameter indicates control current value that TCM outputs to line pressure control solenoid valve.

topic.title: Primary Press Sol (Com) (Primary Pressure Control Solenoid Command, mA)
topic.ptxt: This parameter indicates control current value that TCM outputs to primary pressure control solenoid valve.

topic.title: Low Brake Sol (Com) (Low Brake Control Solenoid Command, mA)
topic.ptxt: This parameter indicates control current value that TCM outputs to low brake control solenoid valve.

topic.title: HC&RB Sol (Com) (High Clutch & Reverse Brake Control Solenoid Command, mA)
topic.ptxt: This parameter indicates control current value that TCM outputs to high clutch & reverse brake control solenoid valve.

topic.title: Lock Up Sol (Com) (Lock Up Control Solenoid Command, mA)
topic.ptxt: This parameter indicates control current value that TCM outputs to TCC solenoid valve.

topic.title: Line Press Sol (Mon) (Line Pressure Solenoid Monitor, mA)
topic.ptxt: This parameter indicates current value that flows to line pressure control solenoid valve.

topic.title: Primary Press Sol (Mon) (Primary Pressure Control Solenoid Monitor, mA)
topic.ptxt: This parameter indicates current value that flows to primary pressure control solenoid valve.

topic.title: Low Brake Sol (Mon) (Low Brake Control Solenoid Monitor, mA)
topic.ptxt: This parameter indicates current value that flows to low brake control solenoid valve.

topic.title: HC&RB Sol (Mon) (High Clutch & Reverse Brake Control Solenoid Monitor, mA)
topic.ptxt: This parameter indicates current value that flows to high clutch & reverse brake control solenoid valve.

topic.title: Lock Up Sol (Mon) (Lock Up Control Solenoid Monitor, mA)
topic.ptxt: This parameter indicates current value that flows to TCC solenoid valve.

topic.title: Engine Speed (rpm)
topic.ptxt: This parameter indicates engine speed sent from ECM through CAN.

topic.title: Throttle Position (%)
topic.ptxt: This parameter indicates throttle position sent from ECM through CAN.

topic.title: ECT (Engine Coolant Temperature, °C, °F)
topic.ptxt: This parameter indicates engine coolant temperature sent from ECM through CAN.

topic.title: Gear Actual Ratio
topic.ptxt: This parameter indicates current gear ratio calculated by TCM based on counter gear ratio, pulley ratio and planetary gear ratio.

topic.title: Planetary Gear Position
topic.ptxt: This parameter indicates current planetary gear position based on signals from secondary pulley speed sensor and vehicle speed sensor.

topic.title: Neutral Control Mode
topic.ptxt: This parameter indicates the states of neutral idle control.

topic.title: Manual Gear Position
topic.ptxt: This parameter indicates shift position information in manual mode.

topic.title: Slip RPM (rpm)
topic.ptxt: This parameter indicates slipping rotation in the torque converter (difference between turbine speed and engine speed).

topic.title: Transaxle Range (P, R, N, D, M)
topic.ptxt: This parameter indicates the state of each range switch in transmission range sensor.

topic.title: P Range
topic.ptxt: This parameter indicates the state of P range switch in transmission range sensor.

topic.title: R Range
topic.ptxt: This parameter indicates the state of R range switch in transmission range sensor.

topic.title: N Range
topic.ptxt: This parameter indicates the state of N range switch in transmission range sensor.

topic.title: D Range
topic.ptxt: This parameter indicates the state of D range switch in transmission range sensor.

topic.title: M Range
topic.ptxt: This parameter indicates the state of M range switch in transmission range sensor.

topic.title: Paddle Up SW (Paddle Up Switch, ON/OFF)
topic.ptxt: This parameter indicates the input states of paddle-up switch “+” to TCM.

topic.title: Paddle Down SW (Paddle Down Switch, ON/OFF)
topic.ptxt: This parameter indicates the input states of paddle-down switch “–” to TCM.

topic.title: Paddle Up SW (Mon) (Paddle Up Switch Monitor, ON/OFF)
topic.ptxt: This parameter indicates the states of paddle-up switch “+”.

topic.title: Paddle Down SW (Mon) (Paddle Down Switch Monitor, ON/OFF)
topic.ptxt: This parameter indicates the states of paddle-down switch “–”.

topic.title: Brake Switch
topic.ptxt: This parameter indicates brake light switch sent from ECM through CAN.
ON: Brake light switch is ON. (Brake pedal depressed)
OFF: Brake light switch is OFF. (Brake pedal released)

topic.title: A/C Comp Clutch
topic.ptxt: This parameter indicates air conditioner request information received from HVAC controller by CAN.
ON: A/C request signal ON.
OFF: A/C request signal OFF.

topic.title: Fuel Cut Active (ON/OFF)
topic.ptxt: This parameter indicates the state of fuel cut signal from ECM.
ON: Fuel injection is cut (output signal to injector is stopped).
OFF: Fuel injection is not cut.

topic.title: ABS Active (ON/OFF)
topic.ptxt: This parameter indicates ABS status sent from ESP® control module through CAN.
ON: ABS operating
OFF: ABS not operating

topic.title: Transaxle Warning Light
topic.ptxt: This parameter indicates the states of transmission warning light output signal from ECM.

topic.title: MIL Request
topic.ptxt: This parameter indicates the states of MIL output signal from ECM.
